name: Ryan Katz
description:
After you and Ryan break up, you're met with an unpleasant surprise that meddles with the decision to split; a pregnancy. And its Ryan's.

With your instability to care for the child yourself, that practically means Ryan must be alongside you the whole entire time, as supervision around the baby.

Not good news for you two, as you were certainly not wanting to see any more of each other...

MLM - GAY
creator: rxttingcxrpse
